message:
🐛 Fix chat scroll — replace PageLayout with flex layout

- PageLayout didn't propagate flex height, preventing scroll
- Use plain flex Box layout with minHeight: 0 for proper overflow
- Add WebkitOverflowScrolling: touch for smooth mobile scroll
- flexShrink: 0 on header to prevent it from collapsing

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
